briefdescription.para: Used to wait in polled function.
Dynamic addresses available for I3C devices.
This function sends dynamic Address Assignment for available devices.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3cPsx instance.
is an array of dynamic addresses.
is the number of slave devices present.

briefdescription.para: Initializes the I3c bus by configuring the device address table, resets and assigns the dynamic address to the slave devices.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3cPsx instance.

simplesect.para: SCL timing must be programmed before calling this function. Call XI3cPsx_SetSClk() or XI3cPsx_SetSClkRate() first so that the RSTDAA and ENTDAA bus transactions issued here run at the intended clock rate. XI3cPsx_CfgInitialize() handles this sequence automatically; callers invoking XI3cPsx_BusInit() directly are responsible for calling XI3cPsx_SetSClk() first.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates an interrupt-driven send in master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It tries to send the first FIFO-full of data, then lets the interrupt handler to handle the rest of the data if there is any.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3cPsx instance.
is the pointer to the send buffer.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
is the instance of XI3cPsx_Cmd.

simplesect.para: This send routine is for interrupt-driven transfer only.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates an interrupt-driven receive in master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It sets the transfer size register so the slave can send data to us. The rest of the work is managed by interrupt handler.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3cPsx instance.
is the pointer to the receive buffer.
is the number of bytes to be received.
is a pointer to the XI3cPsx_Cmd instance.

simplesect.para: This receive routine is for interrupt-driven transfer only.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a polled mode send in master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It sends data to the FIFO and waits for the slave to pick them up. If master fails to send data due arbitration lost, will stop transfer and with arbitration lost status If slave fails to remove data from FIFO, the send fails with time out.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3cPsx instance.
is the pointer to the send buffer.
is the number of bytes to be sent.
is a pointer to the XI3cPsx_Cmd instance.

simplesect.para: This send routine is for polled mode transfer only. All the FIFO operations are in terms of words.

briefdescription.para: This function initiates a polled mode receive in master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It repeatedly sets the transfer size register so the slave can send data to us. It polls the data register for data to come in. If master fails to read data due arbitration lost, will return with arbitration lost status. If slave fails to send us data, it fails with time out.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3cPsx instance.
is the pointer to the receive buffer.
is the number of bytes to be received.
is a pointer to the XI3cPsx_Cmd instance.

simplesect.para: This receive routine is for polled mode transfer only.

briefdescription.para: This function sets the status handler, which the driver calls when it encounters conditions that should be reported to the higher layer software.

detaileddescription.para: The handler executes in an interrupt context, so the amount of processing should be minimized

InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XI3c instance.
FunctionPtr
is the pointer to the callback function.
None.
The handler is called within interrupt context, so it should finish its work quickly.

briefdescription.para: The interrupt handler for the master mode.

detaileddescription.para: It does the protocol handling for the interrupt-driven transfers.

If the Master is receiving data then the data is read from the FIFO and the Master has to request for more data (if there is more data to receive). If all the data has been received then a completion event is signalled to the upper layer by calling the callback handler. It is an error if the amount of received data is more than expected.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XI3cPsx instance.
